channel.title: ACIM Daily Minute
channel.description: Daily readings from A Course in Miracles. One-minute text passages and the 365 Workbook Lessons.

item.title: Daily Minute — July 2, 2026
item.description: When using the idea for today for a specific perceived cause of an upset in any form, use both the name of the form in which you see the upset, and the cause which you ascribe to it. For example: “I am not angry at ____ for the reason I think.” “I am not afraid of ____ for the reason I think.” But again, this should not be substituted for practice periods in which you first search your mind for “s

item.title: Lesson 65: “My only function is the one God gave me.”
item.description: “My only function is the one God gave me.” The idea for today reaffirms your commitment to salvation. It also reminds you that you have no other function than this. Both of these thoughts are obviously necessary for a total commitment. Salvation cannot be the only purpose you hold while you still cherish others. The full acceptance of salvation as your only function necessarily entails two phases;
